case_title: NYASHA UNION VS. ALEX WEINSTEIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED JAN-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL NETWORK
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,698.74 FILED BY UMOH, NYASHA AS TO DEFENDANT WEINSTEIN, ALEX INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL NETWORK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED JAN-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WEINSTEIN, ALEX

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF REPORTS THAT THE DEFENDANTS REFUNDED HER THE FULL AMOUNT REQUESTED IN HER CLAIM. PLAINTIFF NYASHA UMOH IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
